verse_text: not as Cain who was of the wicked one and murdered his brother. And why did he murder him? Because his works were evil and his brother's righteous.

links.context: The Lord rejected Cain and his gifts. Why? The inward state of his heart was not right with God. As [[1JN.3:12]] says of him, "who was of the wicked one." His passions are described in Jude 11 as "the way of Cain."
